subject: [PATCH v4 1/4] btrfs: reserve space for delayed_refs in delalloc

2026-04-13.patch_summary: This patch addresses a problem in the Btrfs file system where space is not reserved for delayed references (delayed_refs) during delalloc operations. Delalloc uses a per-inode block reservation to anticipate metadata needs, but this calculation does not account for delayed refs. As a result, when writeback occurs and delayed refs are generated, they draw from an under-reserved trans_handle's delayed_refs_rsv, leading to incorrect assessments of reserved space in the metadata space reclaim logic. The patch aims to fix this issue by reserving space for delayed refs during delalloc operations.
